zh.Barham Hall, Bury Saint Edmunds, Suffolk: 英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Southwell於1460年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲時，他的父親John Southwell of Varnam Hall35歲，母親Jane Curzon35歲。他於1498年與Cecilia Sharington在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1514年9月27日在他的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。

nameMeanings.name: Southwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English south ‘south’ + wel(le) ‘well, pool, spring’ (Old English sūth + wella). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived ‘by the south well’ or ‘south of the well’, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Southwell (Nottinghamshire) or Southwell on the Isle of Portland (Dorset).
in Yorkshire and Lancashire, often a hypercorrect form of Soothill, a habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Southwell was born in 1460, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Southwell of Varnam Hall, was 35 and his mother, Jane Curzon, was 35. He married Cecilia Sharington in 1498, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 27 September 1514, in his hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Barham Hall, Bury Saint Edmunds, Suffolk: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Southwell est né en 1460, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Southwell of Varnam Hall, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Jane Curzon, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia Sharington en 1498, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 septembre 1514, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Barham Hall, Bury Saint Edmunds, Suffolk: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Southwell 1460 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Southwell of Varnam Hall 35 und seine Mutter Jane Curzon 35. Er hat 1498 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Cecilia Sharington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. September 1514 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Barham Hall, Bury Saint Edmunds, Suffolk: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Southwell(이)가 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Southwell of Varnam Hall(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Curzon(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Cecilia Sharington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1514년 9월 27일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에 묻혔다.

ru.Barham Hall, Bury Saint Edmunds, Suffolk: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Southwell родился в 1460 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Southwell of Varnam Hall было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Curzon, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia Sharington в 1498 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 27 сентября 1514 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
